narrative:
Precinct Whitehouse Village A (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,248 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.7%, a modest Republican lean of 2.6 percentage points.
